threat_scenarios.threat: Malformed frame injection via RELAY adapter send()
threat_scenarios.attack_path: Attacker supplies JSON Message with out-of-range id or oversized payload

threat_scenarios.threat: Checksum bypass — attacker forges checksum field in Message meta
threat_scenarios.attack_path: Attacker supplies meta[lin.checksum] = arbitrary value in from_message
countermeasures: from_message parses checksum from meta for Frame reconstruction only

threat_scenarios.attack_path: Attacker subscribes with depth=1 and DropNewest to cause frame loss

threat_scenarios.threat: Race condition in concurrent send_header calls
threat_scenarios.attack_path: Two concurrent callers both succeed and broadcast different frames for same id
countermeasures: Concurrent safety integration test (10 tasks, 10 frames each)

threat_scenarios.attack_path: Malicious or vulnerable version of a dependency crate introduced
countermeasures: cargo audit on every CI run
